metadata.title: MPV Italia — Luxury Pet Furniture
metadata.description: Luxury furniture for pets. Italian handcrafted sofas designed for your pet's comfort and your home's elegance.
metadata.ogDescription: Italian handcrafted sofas designed for your pet's comfort and your home's elegance.
metadata.twitterDescription: Luxury furniture for pets. Italian handcrafted sofas.
metadata.cartDescription: Review your cart. Luxury handcrafted sofas for pets.
metadata.checkoutDescription: Complete your order. Secure payment via Nexi XPay or PayPal.
metadata.confirmationDescription: Your order has been confirmed successfully. You will receive an email with the details.
metadata.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

footer.brandDesc: Luxury furniture for pets. Italian handcrafted sofas designed for your pet's comfort and your home's elegance.

hero.subtitle: Italian handcrafted sofas designed for your pet's comfort and your home's elegance.

brandStory.desc1: MPV Italia was born from a passion for design and a love for animals. Each sofa is handcrafted in Italy by artisans who understand the importance of comfort and aesthetics.
brandStory.desc2: We use only premium materials — water-repellent velvet, orthopedic memory foam, solid wood — to create pieces that last a lifetime and blend perfectly into your home.

collection.title: Our Sofas
collection.subtitle: Three color variants to suit every style and personality.

craftsmanship.desc: Every component is selected to ensure durability, comfort, and elegance — from fabrics to structures, every detail matters.

materials.name: Water-Repellent Velvet
materials.desc: Premium fabric resistant to stains and hair, soft to the touch and easy to clean.

materials.name: Orthopedic Memory Foam
materials.desc: High-density padding that adapts to your pet's shape, providing ergonomic support.

materials.name: FSC Solid Wood
materials.desc: Certified beech wood frame, sturdy and sustainable — built to last a lifetime.

testimonials.title: Words from Our Clients
testimonials.placeholder: [ Placeholder testimonials — to be replaced with verified reviews ]

items.quote: The MPV sofa has transformed our living room. Bella sleeps peacefully and guests can't believe it's a pet bed.
items.author: Francesca M.

items.quote: Incredible quality, you can tell it's made with love. The fabric perfectly resists our golden retriever's fur.
items.author: Marco T.

items.quote: Finally a product that doesn't compromise home aesthetics. Our cat loves it as much as we do.
items.author: Giulia R.

cta.desc: Discover the MPV Italia collection and give your pet the sofa they deserve. Free delivery and a 2-year warranty on every order.

empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.desc: Browse our collection of handcrafted sofas and add your favorite products to the cart.

payment.title: Payment Method
payment.desc: Choose your payment method. Your payment data is protected and encrypted.
payment.creditCardDesc: Visa, Mastercard, American Express via Nexi XPay
payment.paypalDesc: Pay with PayPal, even in 3 interest-free installments
payment.secure: 🔒 Secure payment processed by {provider}. Your card details are never stored on our servers.

confirmation.title: Order Confirmed!
confirmation.thanks: Thank you for your order. Your order number is:
confirmation.step1: You will receive a confirmation email with your order details.
confirmation.step2: Once your package ships, you will receive the tracking code.
confirmation.step3: The electronic invoice will be sent to the Exchange System (SDI) and you will receive a PDF copy via email.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.content1: Shipping within Italy is free for all orders. Delivery time is 5-7 business days for in-stock items and 2-3 weeks for made-to-order items.
shipping.content2: Delivery is carried out by express courier with scheduled appointment. The courier will contact the customer to arrange delivery.
shipping.content3: International shipping: contact us for a personalized quote.

returns.title: Returns & Right of Withdrawal
returns.content1: You have the right to withdraw within 14 days of receiving the product, pursuant to Legislative Decree 21/2014.
returns.content2Before: To exercise your right of withdrawal, fill out the form available
returns.content2After: and send it to us within 14 days.
returns.content3: The product must be returned in its original condition, complete with packaging and accessories. Return shipping costs are borne by the customer.
returns.content4: The refund will be made within 14 days of receiving the return.

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.content1: All MPV Italia products are covered by a 2-year legal warranty pursuant to Legislative Decree 24/2002.
warranty.content2: The warranty covers manufacturing defects and materials. It does not cover damage resulting from improper use or normal wear and tear.
warranty.content3Before: To request warranty assistance, contact us by email at

care.title: Maintenance & Care
care.content1: The water-repellent velvet upholstery can be cleaned with a damp cloth and mild soap. For stubborn stains, use a specific fabric cleaner.
care.content2: The removable cushion can be washed at 30°C following the instructions on the label.
care.content3: Vacuum regularly to remove hair and dust. Avoid prolonged exposure to direct sunlight.

plp.title: Collection
plp.heading: The Collection
plp.desc: Three sophisticated color variants, each handcrafted in Italy with the finest materials for your pet's ultimate comfort.

cookie.text: We use technical cookies and, with your consent, profiling cookies to improve your experience. For more information, see our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

recesso.title: Withdrawal Form
recesso.subtitle: Pursuant to Legislative Decree 21/2014, you may exercise your right of withdrawal within 14 days of receiving the product.
recesso.successDesc: Your withdrawal request for order #{orderId} has been received. You will receive a confirmation email with return instructions.

chat.welcome: Hello! I'm the MPV Italia assistant. How can I help you? Ask me about products, shipping, payments and more.
chat.error: I'm sorry, an error occurred. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

generic.title: Something Went Wrong
generic.desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

orderConfirmation.heading: Thank you for your order!
orderConfirmation.confirmed: Your order #{orderId} has been confirmed successfully.
orderConfirmation.trackingNotice: You will receive an email with the shipping tracking as soon as your order ships.
orderConfirmation.footer: MPV Italia — Luxury furniture for pets

invoiceDelivery.heading: Your invoice is ready
invoiceDelivery.body: The invoice for your order #{orderId} (Invoice #{number}) has been accepted by the Exchange System (SDI) and is now available for download.
invoiceDelivery.note: Keep this invoice for your records. Electronic invoicing is mandatory in Italy.
invoiceDelivery.footer: MPV Italia — Luxury furniture for pets

shippingUpdate.heading: Your order is on its way!
shippingUpdate.body: Great news! Your order {orderId} has been shipped and is on its way to you.
shippingUpdate.contact: If you have questions about your shipment, contact us at {email}
shippingUpdate.footerSub: Luxury Pet Furniture — Made in Italy
